purpose: Estimating fundamental exchange rate fair value by adjusting for relative productivity and terms of trade, distinguishing from simpler PPP measures.
components: PPP comparison: 15-20% vs EUR, 25-35% vs JPY, 5-10% vs GBP
1-5 year out-of-sample predictive power (Cheung et al. 2005)
current_assessment: The only quantified fair value estimation across all agents. Directionally useful at 1-5 year horizons but cannot serve as a timing signal due to exorbitant privilege sustaining overvaluation for extended periods.
limitations: Exorbitant privilege can sustain overvaluation for years beyond model horizon
AI capex productivity shifts may not be captured in historical calibration
